/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,my_custom_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_interfaces/my_custom_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_interfaces/_my_custom_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alex/workspace/ros2_project/auto_car/my_custom_interfaces/build/my_custom_interfaces/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_interfaces:/home/alex/workspace/ros2_project/auto_car/my_custom_interfaces/build/my_custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_interfaces/libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
